name: claude-creative-stack
description: Knowledge + scaffolding repo for building creative work with Claude (Artifacts, Skills, MCP, API).

scripts.validate: npm run validate:skills && npm run validate:markdown && npm run validate:artifacts && npm run validate:mcp
scripts.validate:artifacts: node -e "const {readdirSync,readFileSync,statSync}=require('fs');const {join}=require('path');for (const f of readdirSync('artifacts/html').filter(x=>x.endsWith('.html'))){const p=join('artifacts/html',f);if(!statSync(p).size||!readFileSync(p,'utf8').includes('</html>'))throw new Error('bad html: '+f);}console.log('artifacts/html OK');"
scripts.validate:mcp: npm run -ws --if-present build && npm run -ws --if-present test
